characters.name: Alan Twitty
characters.description: Alan TwittyGenderMalePhysical AppearanceEye ColorGreenHair ColorBlondePersonal InformationBest FriendsLouis Stevens Alan TwittyisLouis' best friend. He is a big sports fan and plays for Lawrence Junior High's basketball and baseball teams. He is also a musician, ladies' man and formed a band called theAlan Twitty Project, which soon joined forces with Louis' band theLouis Stevens Experience. He is played by AJ Trauth.

characters.name: Beans Aranguren
characters.description:
Beans ArangurenFull NameBernard ArangurenGenderMaleStatusAliveLocationUnknownPhysical AppearanceEye ColorBlueHair ColorBlackPersonal InformationFamilyMr. Aranguren(father)Mrs. Aranguren(mother)Production InformationFirst Appearance"Secret World of Girls"Last Appearance"The Even Stevens Movie"ActorSteven Anthony Lawrence  Bernard "Beans" Arangurenis The Stevens' extremely annoying neighbor, who comes into their home uninvited, makes himself at home, and refuses to leave. Beans' love for bacon is a recurring theme, and in "Little Mr. Sacktown" he visits a bacon shack. 
He eventually turns into a sidekick forLouisandTwitty'sschemes, usually double-crossing the two.

characters.name: Chloe
characters.description: ChloeGenderFemaleLocationSacramento, CAPhysical AppearanceEye ColorBrownHair ColorDark BrownPersonal InformationFriendsLouis Stevens,Ren StevensProduction InformationFirst Appearance"After Hours"Last Appearance"After Hours"ActressJennifer Freeman  Chloeis a weird girl student atLawrence Junior High. Chloe often goes to detention and is known for being a troublemaker just likeLouis Stevens. Assumably because they often end up in detention together, Chloe is a close friend toLouis Stevens. She is also an approaching friend ofRen Stevens. Chloe is a peppy, odd girl who is often looking to the bright side and cheering people up. In "After Hours" she is seen coloring her toenails with a purple marker, that goes to show that she is very unique and strange.

characters.description: Ernie MortonGenderMaleLocationSacramento, CAPhysical AppearanceEye ColorBlueHair ColorBlackPersonal InformationCrushRen StevensProduction InformationFirst Appearance"Swap.com"Last Appearance"Swap.com"ActorAnthony Burch Ernie Mortonis a student atLawrence Junior High. Ernie is viewed as selfish, immature and gross. Ernie longs to hang out with the "popular girls", but that doesn't happen often, mainly because the way he treats people or his lack of personal hygiene.Alan Twittyrefers to him as "The boy who's allergic to soap and water". Please Renee "Ren" Stevensis almost perfect. She has gotten A's in all of her known classes except shop class, where she got a B-. She is commonly regarded as being perfect and overachieving. One of the only wrong things about her is the way that she brushes her teeth. She is the middle of the three Stevens siblings and also the first and only daughter ofSteveandEileen Stevens.
